data.name: Search_InitialSubheading
data.value: Find repositories, code, issues, and pull requests

data.name: Search_InputPlaceholder
data.value: Search repositories, code, issues, and pull requests...

data.name: Search_NoCode
data.value: No code found matching your search.

data.name: Search_NoIssues
data.value: No issues found matching your search.

data.name: Search_NoPullRequests
data.value: No pull requests found matching your search.

data.name: Search_NoRepositories
data.value: No repositories found matching your search.

data.name: Home_PrivateDescription
data.value: Only you (and collaborators) can see this repository.

data.name: Home_CreateFirst
data.value: Create your first repository to get started.

data.name: Home_StorageLocationHint
data.value: Full path where the bare repository will be created.

data.name: Login_EnterCode
data.value: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app

data.name: Explore_NoResults
data.value: No repositories found matching your criteria.

data.name: Repo_ConfirmDeleteFile
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this file?

data.name: Repo_ConfirmDeleteRepo
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this repository?

data.name: Repo_NoReleasesDescription
data.value: No releases have been published yet.

data.name: Repo_PublicDesc
data.value: Public — anyone can see this repository

data.name: Repo_PrivateDesc
data.value: Private — only you can see this repository

data.name: Repo_TopicsHelp
data.value: Topics help users discover your repository.

data.name: Repo_TemplateRepoDesc
data.value: allow this repo to be used as a template

data.name: Repo_DefaultBranchHelp
data.value: The default branch is considered the "base" branch for pull requests and code display.

data.name: Repo_TransferDesc
data.value: Transfer this repository to another user or organization.

data.name: Issues_DraftDescription
data.value: Draft issues are not visible to others until published.

data.name: Repo_RequireSignedCommits
data.value: Require signed commits — all commits must be GPG-signed

data.name: Repo_ProtectedFilePatternsHelp
data.value: Comma-separated glob patterns. Changes to matching files require review approval.

data.name: Compare_NoCommits
data.value: One or both branches have no commits.

data.name: Actions_ClickRunWorkflow
data.value: Click "Run workflow" to trigger a workflow from .github/workflows/

data.name: Actions_NoWebhooksDescription
data.value: No webhooks have been configured yet.

data.name: Insights_NetworkDescription
data.value: Network graph of forks and branches

data.name: Wiki_CreateFirstPrompt
data.value: Get started by creating the first wiki page.

data.name: Projects_NoProjectsDescription
data.value: Projects help you organize and track your work.

data.name: Security_NoAdvisoriesDescription
data.value: No security advisories have been published.

data.name: Packages_NoPackagesDescription
data.value: No packages have been published yet.

data.name: Snippets_NoSnippetsDescription
data.value: No snippets have been created yet.

data.name: Notif_AuthRequiredMessage
data.value: You must be signed in to view notifications.

data.name: Import_AuthRequiredMessage
data.value: You must be signed in to import repositories.

data.name: Settings_AuthRequiredMessage
data.value: You must be signed in to access settings.

data.name: Admin_AccessDeniedMessage
data.value: You do not have permission to access the admin panel.

data.name: Admin_AuthRequiredMessage
data.value: You must be signed in to access the admin panel.

data.name: Error_DevModeDescription
data.value: Swapping to the Development environment will display more detailed information about the error that occurred.

data.name: Error_DevModeWarning
data.value: The Development environment shouldn't be enabled for deployed applications. It can result in displaying sensitive information from exceptions to end users. For local debugging, enable the Development environment by setting the ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT environment variable to Development and restarting the app.

data.name: Error_Subheading
data.value: An error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: NotFound_Message
data.value: Sorry, the content you are looking for does not exist.

data.name: Home_InitializePrompt
data.value: Initialize a repository in {0} to get started.

data.name: Home_NoMatchingSearch
data.value: We couldn't find any repositories matching '{0}'

data.name: Login_Error
data.value: An error occurred during login. Please try again.

data.name: Login_InvalidRecoveryCode
data.value: Invalid recovery code. Please try again.

data.name: Login_InvalidAuthCode
data.value: Invalid authentication code. Please try again.

data.name: Login_VerificationError
data.value: An error occurred during verification. Please try again.

data.name: Login_PasskeyFailed
data.value: Passkey verification failed. Please try again.

data.name: Login_RecoveryCodeHelp
data.value: Enter one of your recovery codes.

data.name: Login_AuthCodeHelp
data.value: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

data.name: Import_GitUrlExample
data.value: Any valid Git URL (HTTPS or SSH)

data.name: Import_RepoNameHelp
data.value: The name for the new local repository

data.name: Import_AuthTokenHelp
data.value: Required for private repositories. Use a personal access token with read access.

data.name: Import_AuthTokenPlaceholder
data.value: Personal access token for private repos

data.name: Import_AboutDescription
data.value: Import repositories from GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, or any Git URL. The repository will be cloned with its full history.

data.name: Import_AboutInclude
data.value: GitHub / GitLab imports can also include:

data.name: Import_AboutIssues
data.value: Issues with their descriptions and state

data.name: Import_AboutPRs
data.value: Pull requests / merge requests (imported as issues)

data.name: Import_AboutPrivate
data.value: For private repositories, provide a personal access token with the appropriate read permissions.

data.name: Env_NoEnvironmentsDescription
data.value: Environments let you configure deployment targets with protection rules like required reviewers and wait timers.

data.name: SecretScan_NoSecretsDescription
data.value: Secret scanning checks your code for accidentally committed credentials like API keys, tokens, and passwords.

data.name: Traffic_NoData
data.value: No traffic data available yet. Traffic data is collected when users clone, fetch, or view repository pages.

data.name: Issues_TransferDescription
data.value: Move this issue to another repository. Comments and matching labels will be copied.

data.name: Issues_ContributingAlert
data.value: Please read the contributing guidelines before submitting an issue.

data.name: Pulse_NoActivity
data.value: No activity in the last 7 days.

data.name: Depbot_Description
data.value: Automatically check for outdated dependencies and create pull requests to update them.
